REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 04/10/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
